dataElement.displayDescription: Length of Stay (should always be 0). For Reporting purpose only

dataElement.displayName: NeoIPC Admission on day of life
dataElement.displayDescription: For infants that have not been delivered in your own hospital, record the infant's day of life on the day of admission (day of birth = day of life 1. The next day, starting at 00:00, is the second day of life.)
Describes if the infant was born in your hospital or if it was admitted after birth and if so, how long after birth.

Yes: A procedure that is documented per the facility's protocol to be an emergency or urgent procedure. No: The intervention is initiated and performed in a planned manner Unknown: No information available.

trackedEntityAttribute.displayDescription: Use this identifier to uniquely identify a patient in the system. Ideally use an unique random string of characters. If have a requirement to identify a patient you have entered here, you can use this identifier as the NeoIPC key for pseudonymization. NEVER use an identifier that is used anywhere else and that you do not fully control (e.g. do NOT use the patient id from your hospital information system).

Typically the phenotypic sex of the patient. If sex cannot be determined from the patient's phenotype or genotype, or if the genotype is neither XX nor XY, it is considered undetermined for purposes of surveillance.
